# audiovisualAsset

**Instance Property**

The video asset, as an `AVAsset` object.

## Declaration

```swift
var audiovisualAsset: AVAsset? { get }
```

## Discussion

This object provides access to the video asset as a collection of tracks and metadata. For details on working with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AVFoundation/AVAsset] objects, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/AudioVideo/Conceptual/AVFoundationPG/Articles/00_Introduction.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40010188].

## Working with Video Assets

- **avAsset**: The video asset, as an `AVAsset` object.
